name: Bundled AWS IAM Exposure Rules
description: Offline snapshot of high-risk AWS IAM permissions and privilege escalation patterns inspired by Rhino Security Labs, NCC Group/PMapper, Bishop Fox, Cloudsplaining, HackTricks, pathfinding.cloud, WithSecure IAMGraph research, Datadog cloud security research, and AWS IAM guidance.
license_note: Rule wording is original project content with source attribution. Review upstream licenses before importing external machine-readable rules directly.

rules.name: Direct administrator-equivalent permissions
rules.business_impact: The principal can perform administrator-level actions across the account.
rules.recommendation: Remove administrator access from human and workload principals unless explicitly break-glass, and replace it with scoped role-based access.

rules.name: Can activate an existing privileged policy version
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to activate a dormant policy version that grants broader access.
rules.recommendation: Remove policy version management from non-admin principals and delete unused policy versions.

rules.name: Can create a new privileged policy version
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to add administrator permissions to a customer managed policy and set it as default.
rules.recommendation: Restrict policy version creation to tightly controlled administrative roles.

rules.name: Can attach policies to users
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to attach administrator access to itself or another user.
rules.recommendation: Remove direct policy attachment rights from users and require controlled role-based administration.

rules.name: Can write inline user policies
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to grant itself or another user arbitrary permissions with an inline policy.
rules.recommendation: Restrict inline policy writes and monitor for direct user policy changes.

rules.name: Can add users to privileged groups
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to add itself or another identity to a group with elevated permissions.
rules.recommendation: Restrict group membership administration and review privileged groups for unnecessary membership.

rules.name: Can rewrite role trust policies
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to make a privileged role assumable by itself or an attacker-controlled principal.
rules.recommendation: Restrict trust-policy mutation to a small set of administrative roles and alert on trust changes.

rules.name: Can create access keys for users
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to create long-lived credentials for another user and pivot through that identity.
rules.recommendation: Remove access-key creation except from tightly governed break-glass or provisioning workflows.

rules.name: Can create console login profiles
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to set a console password for a user that did not previously have console access.
rules.recommendation: Restrict login-profile management and prefer federated human access.

rules.name: Can pass roles to EC2 instances
prerequisites: A passable role exists with useful privileges and EC2 service trust.
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to launch compute with a privileged instance profile and retrieve temporary credentials.
rules.recommendation: Constrain iam:PassRole resources and conditions, restrict EC2 launch rights, and review passable role trust.

rules.name: Can pass roles to Lambda
prerequisites: A passable role exists with useful privileges and Lambda service trust.
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to create code that runs under a more privileged Lambda execution role.
rules.recommendation: Scope iam:PassRole to approved Lambda roles and restrict function creation to deployment pipelines.

rules.name: Can pass roles to CloudFormation
prerequisites: A passable CloudFormation service role exists or can be supplied.
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to deploy infrastructure under a privileged service role.
rules.recommendation: Restrict stack creation and iam:PassRole to approved deployment roles with guardrails.

rules.name: Can pass roles to CodeBuild
prerequisites: A passable CodeBuild service role exists.
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to run build jobs under a privileged service role.
rules.recommendation: Restrict CodeBuild project creation and scope passable roles to approved CI roles.

rules.name: Can pass roles to ECS tasks
prerequisites: A passable ECS task role or execution role exists.
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to run containers with a more privileged task role.
rules.recommendation: Restrict task definition registration, RunTask, and passable ECS roles.

rules.name: Can pass roles to Glue
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to create Glue resources that run with a more privileged role.
rules.recommendation: Restrict Glue resource creation and scope iam:PassRole to approved Glue roles.

rules.name: Can pass roles to SageMaker notebooks
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to create notebook compute with a privileged execution role.
rules.recommendation: Restrict notebook creation and scope passable SageMaker roles.

rules.name: Can pass roles to App Runner
prerequisites: A passable App Runner instance role exists.
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to create workloads that run with a more privileged instance role.
rules.recommendation: Restrict App Runner service creation and passable roles.

rules.name: Can modify existing Lambda code
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to alter code that already runs with a privileged execution role.
rules.recommendation: Restrict Lambda update permissions to deployment pipelines and monitor function code changes.

rules.name: Can modify existing CodeBuild projects
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to alter build commands that run under a privileged build role.
rules.recommendation: Restrict CodeBuild update/start permissions and protect buildspec changes.

rules.name: Can execute commands on managed instances
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to execute commands on managed compute and access attached workload credentials.
rules.recommendation: Restrict SSM command execution by resource, document, and operator role.

rules.name: Can read secrets at broad scope
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to retrieve application, database, or third-party secrets.
rules.recommendation: Scope secret read access to specific secrets and require workload-specific roles.

rules.name: Can attach policies to roles
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to attach broader permissions to a role and escalate through that identity.
rules.recommendation: Restrict role policy attachment to dedicated admin workflows.

rules.name: Can write inline role policies
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to inject arbitrary permissions into a role.
rules.recommendation: Restrict inline role policy changes and monitor role policy updates.

rules.name: Can attach policies to groups
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to attach broader permissions to a group and escalate through membership.
rules.recommendation: Restrict group policy attachment to a small number of privileged operators.

rules.name: Can write inline group policies
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to inject arbitrary permissions into a group.
rules.recommendation: Restrict inline group policy changes and monitor group policy updates.

rules.name: Can update console passwords
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to reset or change another user's console password.
rules.recommendation: Restrict login profile updates and move humans to federated identity.

rules.name: Can attach roles to instance profiles
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to attach a privileged role to an EC2 instance profile and launch compute with it.
rules.recommendation: Restrict instance profile changes and EC2 launch permissions.

rules.name: Can pass roles to Data Pipeline
prerequisites: A passable Data Pipeline role exists.
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to define a pipeline that executes arbitrary actions under a passable role.
rules.recommendation: Restrict Data Pipeline creation and role passing to approved automation.

rules.name: Can update Glue development endpoints
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to alter a Glue dev endpoint and access the attached role's privileges.
rules.recommendation: Restrict Glue dev endpoint updates and monitor SSH key changes.

rules.name: Can invoke existing Lambda functions
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to trigger already privileged Lambda code paths.
rules.recommendation: Restrict invoke permissions on privileged Lambda functions.

rules.name: Can modify S3 bucket policies
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to expose or redirect bucket data through policy changes.
rules.recommendation: Restrict bucket policy writes and alert on policy changes.

rules.name: Can modify Secrets Manager resource policies
rules.business_impact: The principal may be able to expand who can read secrets.
rules.recommendation: Restrict resource policy changes on secrets and monitor policy drift.
